ASBESTOS DISCOVERY 503, DEFENDANT ANCHOR DARLING VALVE COMPANY'S MOTION TO DISMISS ACTION, OR ALTERNATIVELY, FOR ISSUANCE OF EVIDENCE SANCTION AGAINST PLAINTIFF, AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. NO APPEARANCE AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT ANCHOR DARLING VALVE COMPANY'S MOTION TO DISMISS IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT IS DISMISSED FROM THIS ACTION PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 2023.030(D)(3) FOR PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THIS COURT'S MARCH 23, 2016 ORDER. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,724 IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 2023.030(A). NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG, MATTER NOT REPORTED

Motion To Dismiss Action, Or Alternatively, For Issuance Of Evidence Sanction Against Plaintiff, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Mitchell B. Greenberg of ABBEY, WEITZENBERG, WARREN & EMERY (707-542-5050), appearing for defendant / moving party Anchor Darling Valve Company

Ruling:
DEFENDANT ANCHOR DARLING VALVE COMPANY'S MOTION TO DISMISS ACTION, OR ALTERNATIVELY, FOR ISSUANCE OF EVIDENCE SANCTION AGAINST PLAINTIFF, AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS

No appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Anchor Darling Valve Company's motion to dismiss is granted. Defendant is dismissed from this action pursuant to C.C.P. 2023.030(d)(3) for plaintiff's failure to comply with this Court's March 23, 2016 order. Defendant's request for monetary sanctions against plaintiff in the amount of $1,724 is granted pursuant to C.C.P. 2023.030(a). No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Matter not reported (503/GLW)

Joinder To Defendants Anchor Darling Valve Companys Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Action, Or Alternatively, For Issuance Of Evidence Sanction Against Plaintiff, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Zurn Industries, LLC's joinder to Anchor Darling Valve Company's motion to dismiss action, or alternatively, for issuance of evidence sanctions against plaintiff, and for monetary sanctions is denied without prejudice as untimely. Zurn failed to provide proper notice as required by C.C.P. 1005(b). Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Matter not reported (503/GLW)

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Anchor Darling Valve Company To Compel Plaintiffs Deposition And For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Mar-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Mitchell B. Greenberg of ABBEY, WEITZENBERG, WARREN & EMERY (707-542-5050), appearing for defendant / moving party Anchor Darling Valve Company

RULING:
DEFENDANT ANCHOR DARLING VALVE COMPANY'S MOTION OF DEFENDANT ANCHOR DARLING VALVE COMPANY TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS DEPOSITION AND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS

No appearance made by Mr. James Swan. Counsel for defendant did inform Mr. Swan of this tentative ruling and did not hear from him. The Court adopted its tentative ruling: Defendant Anchor Darling Valve Company's motion to compel plaintiff James Swan's deposition and for production of documents is granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff James Swan must appear for his deposition at 9:30a.m. on April 26, 2016 at Aiken & Welch Court Reporters, One Kaiser Plaza, Suite 250, Oakland, California, 94612. Deposition will continue day to day, excluding weekends and holidays, until completed. Plaintiff must serve a response to the request for production of documents, without objection, and must produce any responsive documents at his deposition. Defendant's request for monetary sanctions of $1,664 against plaintiff is granted pursuant to C.C.P. 2025.450(g)(1) & (2). Order signed in open court. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Matter not reported (503/GLW)

DEPT 206 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-14-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jennifer L. Alesio of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for moving party Brayton Purcell LLP

RULING:
BRAYTON PURCELL, LLP'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF JAMES SWAN

Hearing held. The Court made the following ruling: Nancy Williams, Brayton Purcell LLP's motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff James Swan is granted. Brayton Purcell demonstrated that Mr. Swan had received proper notice of this motion, and that the service requirements of CRC 3.1362 were satisfied. Order signed in open court. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Reporter: Kimberly R. Hendershott of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12552 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/GLW)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD

Brayton Purcell LLP's, Nancy Williams' motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff James Swan is continued on the court's own motion to January 14, 2016. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)
